# PropTech Insights
 
> PropTech Insights is a UK-based PropTech consulting firm founded by Michael Marciano, helping property finance brokerages and lenders (typically 10-100 person teams) move faster with clarity through technology strategy, workflow automation, and data consulting.
 
## About
- Founded by Michael Marciano, a PropTech strategist with 10+ years at the intersection of real estate and technology
- Previously held a senior product role at EG (Estates Gazette), part of the CoStar Group
- Host of the Pixel Chasing podcast covering PropTech and real estate technology
- Based in the United Kingdom, serving the UK property market
 
## Services
- **Strategy**: Go-to-market strategies, technology roadmaps, and market positioning for PropTech companies
- **Product**: Product roadmaps, feature prioritization, and user research for property technology platforms
- **Data & Analytics**: Property data strategy, analytics implementation, and insight generation
- **Workflow Automation**: Reducing administrative overhead for mortgage brokers and lenders through technology
- **Technology Selection**: Helping firms evaluate and choose the right PropTech stack
- **Market Advisory**: Navigating complex UK property market dynamics and regulatory landscape
 
## Expertise Areas
- UK property finance (mortgage brokers, lenders, bridging finance)
- PropTech strategy and consulting
- Real estate data and analytics
- Workflow automation for property firms
- Product management for built environment technology
- Agency licensing and data acquisition (including Shared Property Data)
- NPS improvement and customer experience in property tech
 
## Contact
- Website: https://www.proptechinsights.com
- Email: Michael@PropTechInsights.com
- Tagline: "Native to Real Estate // Fluent in Tech"
